items.title: Apple unveils new MacBooks powered by M5 chips
items.description: Alongside its new low-cost iPhone 17e, Apple (AAPL) has teased its new MacBook Air and MacBook Pro powered by more powerful M5 Pro and M5 Max chips ahead of its product launch event on Wednesday. Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley discusses the new laptop line's core features and capabilities. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Asking for a Trend.

items.title: Prediction: Nvidia's Feb. 25 Earnings Report Just Proved Why It Will Be the Best-Performing "Magnificent Seven" Stock in 2026
items.description: Nvidia has plenty of room to run after its blowout earnings and strong guidance.

items.title: Apple's New Product Blitz This Week Enhances the Stock's Bull Case
items.description: The tech giant's latest barrage of hardware announcements highlights a durable business with incredible financial momentum.

items.title: Berkshire Hathaway's New CEO Omits Bank of America And Chevron In Letter To Shareholders After Warren Buffett's Exit
items.description: In his inaugural letter to shareholders as CEO, Greg Abel signaled a potential shift in Berkshire Hathaway Inc.'s equity strategy by not mentioning two of the firm's largest holdings from his list of “core” investments. The ‘Core Four’ Vs. The Missing Giants Abel's letter emphasized a “concentrated approach” toward businesses Berkshire intends to hold for decades. items.title: Apple Refreshes MacBook Computers, Studio Display Lineup
items.description: Apple continued its busy week of new product announcements on Tuesday with a refreshed lineup of MacBook computers and professional displays.
